plugins.name: frontend-skills
plugins.description: React/TypeScript frontend + Go backend enforcement harness. 92 wired hooks, 101 scripts, 66 skills (includes /diagnose feedback-loop-first 6-phase debugger, /triage multi-tracker (gh + acli) state machine, green-not-done warnings gate via `test-warning-check` + `ci-warning-audit`, /steelman anti-sycophancy guard, /snyk-ux-security with JS+Go tracks, exploitability-triage first gate, top-level-first upgrade ladder, `govulncheck`), 9 agents, 5 routines. 21 LLM failure modes (7 Karpathy single-agent + 14 MAST multi-agent, Cemri et al. NeurIPS 2025). OWASP+STRIDE, Core Web Vitals gate, bun/yarn lockfile parity, MCP ban with CLI redirect, worktree isolation, agent-browser integration. Opus 4.7 tuned. POSIX-friendly.

x-changelog.4.11.0: 2026-05-26 -- Add `/visual-review` skill for browser-based frontend QA before PRs. The workflow runs standalone and is wired into `/go`, `/commit-push`, `/commit-push-pr`, self-reviewer, and code-reviewer for frontend diffs, requiring visual review evidence or an explicit skip reason. Ships platform/environment fingerprinting (browser, user agent, platform, viewport, visualViewport, DPR, media preferences, locale/direction), a platform risk map, Web Weekly-informed visual/a11y/perf checks, and 79 eval assertions. Skills 65 -> 66.
x-changelog.4.10.6: 2026-05-25 -- Codex marketplace install fix: expose root plugin through root plugin path so Codex marketplace source path is a plugin directory while retaining root-relative plugin packaging.
x-changelog.4.10.5: 2026-05-25 -- Vendor remaining mattpocock/skills into repo, caveman-compress new skill docs, add vendoring evals, and fix detached-HEAD branch-safety eval coverage.
x-changelog.4.10.4: 2026-05-25 -- Complete mattpocock/skills May 18-20 sync: add /improve-codebase-architecture HTML-report workflow + HTML-REPORT.md, redaction guardrails in /handoff, and glossary-only CONTEXT-FORMAT cleanup; evals expanded.
x-changelog.4.10.3: 2026-05-21 -- Add /handoff skill for compact cross-session and cross-agent continuation briefs. Registers the skill in plugin packaging, documents the workflow, and adds eval coverage. Skills 51 -> 52.
x-changelog.4.10.2: 2026-05-06 -- Codex hook parity pass: map Claude PostToolUseFailure into Codex PostToolUse, add a Codex PermissionRequest adapter that reuses approval-safe Bash/MCP deny guardrails, and regenerate Codex hooks so the plugin uses every supported Codex lifecycle event with an equivalent harness behavior.
x-changelog.4.10.1: 2026-05-06 -- Codex marketplace packaging fix: point Codex plugin hooks at a Codex-supported lifecycle file, regenerate .codex/hooks.json from the manifest, refresh stale install-surface copy (92 hooks / 100 scripts / 51 skills / 9 agents / 5 routines), and bump marketplace metadata for upgrade detection.
x-changelog.4.10.0: 2026-04-29 -- Sync mattpocock/skills (Apr 17 -> Apr 29). New `/diagnose` skill ported verbatim: feedback-loop-first 6-phase debug discipline (build loop -> reproduce -> 3-5 ranked falsifiable hypotheses -> instrument -> fix at correct seam -> cleanup + post-mortem hand-off to `/improve-codebase-architecture`); ships `scripts/hitl-loop.template.sh`. Merged `github-triage` + `triage-issue` into single `/triage` (multi-tracker `tracker-github.md` via `gh` + `tracker-jira.md` via `acli`); bug-investigation + TDD-fix-plan absorbed as sub-mode. Vague-prose domain-glossary + ADR awareness added to /tdd, /improve-codebase-architecture, /zoom-out, /triage -- soft-dep, degrades gracefully when no `CONTEXT.md`. Upstream content merged while preserving 3-hat fan-out: `improve-codebase-architecture/LANGUAGE.md` (canonical vocab + deletion test), `tdd/tests.md` (good vs bad tests), `domain-model/ADR-FORMAT.md` 'what qualifies' enriched. Skills 48 -> 51. +96 eval checks. Skipped per direction: caveman, git-guardrails, to-prd/to-issues, setup skill explicit pointer.
x-changelog.4.9.0: 2026-04-23 -- Green != done warnings gate (+2 hooks, 89->91 wired, 98->100 scripts). `test-warning-check.sh` (PostToolUse Bash) scans passing `vitest`/`bun test`/`playwright`/`tsgo`/`biome`/`lint` stdout+stderr for curated patterns: Node `DeprecationWarning`/`ExperimentalWarning`/`(node:) XxxWarning`, React `act()`/missing-key/DOM-nesting/prop-type/bad-setstate/non-boolean-attr, unhandled rejection + unhandled error, vitest `stderr |` during test, skipped counts, `@ts-expect-error` + `@ts-ignore`, `npm WARN deprecated`. Per-finding escape `// allow: test-warning` or env `TEST_WARNINGS_ALLOW=1`. 3x same-kind streak escalates. `ci-warning-audit.sh` (Stop) fetches `gh run view <id> --log` on green PR CI (per-SHA cache, 45s timeout), greps same pattern, surfaces file:line sample. Gates: feature branch, session touched code, PR exists, all checks SUCCESS. Disable via `CI_WARNING_AUDIT=0`. CLAUDE.md Tests + /tdd `When Done` updated. Why: green tests can spew deprecations / log errors / leak unhandled rejections -- tomorrow's bugs.
x-changelog.4.8.0: 2026-04-22 -- /steelman anti-sycophancy skill, opt-in via slash only. Forces strongest counter-case with repo evidence before agreeing with user claims (factual/causal/architectural only -- preference/goal/scope declined). No ambient CLAUDE.md rule, no automatic hook, no telemetry script -- plugin consumers see zero behavior change unless they type `/steelman`. Skills 47 -> 48.
